name: Chinawe.com Inc.
summary: Chinawe.com Inc. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was involved in the provision of professional management services relating to non-performing loans, as well as other consulting services in the People's Republic of China. The company was formerly known as Neo Modern Entertainment Corp. Chinawe.com Inc. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
